mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT year FROM eval_type_52 ORDER BY year DESC

SELECT tr.type_id AS typeId, et.name AS evalPeriod, d.name AS deptName, e.position AS position, e.emp_no AS empNo, e.name AS empName, CASE WHEN tr.status = 0 THEN '본인평가중' ELSE '1차평가대기' END AS status FROM type_result_52 tr JOIN employee_52 e ON tr.emp_no = e.emp_no JOIN department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id JOIN eval_type_52 et ON tr.type_id = et.id WHERE 1=1
AND et.year = #{year}
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 1 AND 6
AND MONTH(et.start_date) BETWEEN 7 AND 12
AND (e.emp_no = #{empNo} OR d.leader_emp_no = #{empNo})

SELECT tr.type_id AS typeId, d.name AS deptName, d.leader_emp_no AS leaderEmpNo, e.position AS position, e.emp_no AS empNo, e.name AS empName, fr.grade AS totalGrade, CASE WHEN tr.status = 0 THEN '본인평가중' ELSE '1차평가대기' END AS status FROM type_result_52 tr JOIN employee_52 e ON tr.emp_no = e.emp_no JOIN department_52 d ON e.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN final_result_52 fr ON e.emp_no = fr.emp_no AND fr.year = (SELECT TOP 1 year FROM eval_type_52 WHERE id = #{typeId}) WHERE tr.type_id = #{typeId} AND tr.emp_no = #{empNo}

SELECT q.id AS questionId, q.category AS categoryName, q.question AS goalDesc, q.weight AS weight, a1.content AS selfFeedback, a1.score AS selfScore, a2.content AS firstFeedback, a2.score AS firstScore FROM eval_question_52 q LEFT JOIN eval_answer_52 a1 ON q.id = a1.question_id AND a1.mapping_id = ( SELECT id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND CAST(step AS VARCHAR) = 'SELF' ) LEFT JOIN eval_answer_52 a2 ON q.id = a2.question_id AND a2.mapping_id = ( SELECT id FROM eval_target_mapping_52 WHERE evaluatee_no = #{empNo} AND CAST(step AS VARCHAR) = 'FIRST' ) WHERE q.type_id = #{typeId}
mapper.update: UPDATE type_result_52 SET status = #{status}, updated_at = GETDATE() WHERE type_id = #{typeId} AND emp_no = #{empNo}
